title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Migration Framework
summary: CyberSecurity Malaysia's PQC Migration Framework provides a structured, strategic pathway to help organisations transition from traditional cryptographic systems to quantum-safe alternatives and safeguard Malaysia's digital infrastructure against quantum threats.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Initiatives
summary: CyberSecurity Malaysia's overview of its post-quantum cryptography programme, covering the PQC Migration Framework, post-quantum algorithm research, encryption-standard work (MySEAL), industry partnerships and quantum-safe migration services.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Initiatives - Documents
summary: MyKripto documents page hosting CyberSecurity Malaysia's PQC publications, including the PQC Migration Framework and the technical guide 'Recommendations for the Adoption and Implementation of Post-Quantum Cryptographic Solutions'.

title: Post-Quantum Cryptography Services
summary: CyberSecurity Malaysia's PQC service offering: expert consultations to plan and execute migration from classical to quantum-safe cryptography, plus awareness sessions and technical workshops to build organisational quantum-readiness.

title: MYNIC'S Preparing For Tomorrow's Threat: The Impact Of Quantum Computing On Internet Security
summary: Ministry of Digital speech/announcement (21 April 2026) for a MYNIC programme on quantum computing's impact on internet security, stating that quantum computing can break existing cryptographic codes and that the transition to post-quantum cryptography (PQC) has become an urgent necessity, including replacing at-risk DNSSEC protocols. Delivered with NACSA and MYNIC participation.
